RuleSet.Name: libschemaxml/schemaxml/SchemaSaxLdr.hpp
RuleSet.Descr: C++18 XML Command Line Interface common core specification for Schema
RuleSet.GenRule: virtual void evaluateRemainingArgs( size_t argc, char* argv[], size_t consumed );
static void applyLoaderOptions( $CPlusNamespace$::$SchemaName$SaxLoader* loader, const std::string& loaderOptions );
static void evalLoaderSegment( $CPlusNamespace$::$SchemaName$SaxLoader* loader, const std::string& evalSegment );
